---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want?
<!-- A clear description of the feature -->

## Why do you want it?
<!-- What problem does it solve or what does it improve -->

## How does it fit the core philosophy?
<!-- Explain how this keeps the keyboard private, offline, local, fast, and low-end friendly -->

## Have you considered alternatives?
<!-- Any other approaches you thought of -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, examples, or anything else -->
